title: Bail applications under way for Asla Park rape-accused
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men (27 and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men (27 and 31) accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, on Friday 26 September appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court again today, 6 October, for bail application procedures.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men (27 and 31) accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, on Friday 26 September appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court again today, 6 October, for bail application procedures."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The victim’s friends and family held a small protest outside the court today to show their support and to oppose the possibility of bail being granted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the woman had allegedly received a lift from a man after a party in the early hours of 26 September, and that he took her to his home where he and his friend allegedly raped her.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the woman had allegedly received a lift from a man after a party in the early hours of 26 September, and that he took her to his home where he and his friend allegedly raped her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A case of rape was opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and was then transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit.","html":"A case of rape was opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and was then transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The two suspects were arrested shortly after."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case has been postponed to Wednesday 8 October. Both of the accused remain in police custody.","html":"The case has been postponed to Wednesday 8 October. Both of the accused remain in police custody."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Two arrested in connection with Asla Park rape"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Bail applications under way for Asla Park rape-accused
